---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_document
---

```{r package_setup, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 9,   # increase width
  fig.height = 9,
  out.width = "100%"   # VERY IMPORTANT
)

library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)

source(here::here('notebooks', 'utils.R'))
```


```{r}
t.features = read_csv_locale(here::here('data', 'gapminder-popcit.csv'))
t.misc = read_csv_locale(here::here('data', 'gapminder-misc.csv'))
t.countries = read_csv_locale(here::here('data', 'gapminder-countries.csv'))

# skip forecast columns
feature.names <- colnames(t.features)[seq(3, ncol(t.features), 2)]
# we group buiéd t.all with:
#.  - join all table on country ( + year)
#  - features from features.names
#  - some country info from t.country
#  - population total from t.misc
#  - compute poprural as the difference between the country total and the sum in city
#  - rename time to year, name to country
# -  add a caption with the source
t.all = t.features |>
  left_join(t.countries|> select(country, name, world_6region), by = 'country')|>
  left_join(t.misc |> select(country, time, pop), by = c('time', 'country')) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(poprural = sum(pop - sum(c_across(all_of(unlist(feature.names)))))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-country) |>
  rename(
    year = time,
    country = name,
  )

feature.names = c(feature.names, "poprural")
cols.data = c("year", "country", "world_6region", "pop", feature.names)
t.all <- t.all[, cols.data]
t.long <- t.all |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(feature.names), names_to = "category", values_to = "n") |>
  # filter(n != 0)|>
  # reorder the levels in ascending order
  mutate(category = fct_relevel(category, "poprural", "popcit_less_300k", "popcit_300_500k", "popcit_500k_1m", "popcit_1_5m", "popcit_5_10m", "popcit_more_10m")) |>
  # alter the names to more readable strings
  mutate(category = fct_recode(
    category,
    "Rural" = "poprural",
    "<300k" = "popcit_less_300k",
    "300-500k" = "popcit_300_500k",
    "500k-1M" = "popcit_500k_1m",
    "1-5M" = "popcit_1_5m",
    "5-10M" = "popcit_5_10m",
    ">10M" = "popcit_more_10m",
  ))

```

# World Rural Exodus

```{r}

ggplot(
  data = t.long |> filter(country == 'Ethiopia'),
  mapping = aes(
    x = year,
    y = n,
    colour = category
  )
) +
  geom_line(
    lwd = 2,
    position = "stack"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 22)
```
